sentence_reviews.text: Domain randomization varies simulated appearance, dynamics, sensors, delays, objects, and disturbances so a policy learns behavior robust across many plausible worlds.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Tobin et al. introduce domain randomization for sim-to-real transfer by randomizing simulator properties; sim-to-real surveys cover broader appearance/dynamics/sensor variation and transfer issues.
sentence_reviews.notes: The broad list of appearance, dynamics, sensors, delays, objects, and disturbances is plausible, but Tobin et al. alone most directly supports visual/domain parameter randomization.

sentence_reviews.text: It attempts to make the real environment look like one more sample from the training distribution.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Tobin et al. introduce domain randomization for sim-to-real transfer by randomizing simulator properties; sim-to-real surveys cover broader appearance/dynamics/sensor variation and transfer issues.
sentence_reviews.notes: Domain randomization is explicitly motivated by making real observations appear as samples from randomized simulated training domains.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Tobin et al. introduce domain randomization for sim-to-real transfer by randomizing simulator properties; sim-to-real surveys cover broader appearance/dynamics/sensor variation and transfer issues.
sentence_reviews.notes: Randomized robot physics is common in sim-to-real surveys, though not the narrow Tobin visual example alone.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Tobin et al. introduce domain randomization for sim-to-real transfer by randomizing simulator properties; sim-to-real surveys cover broader appearance/dynamics/sensor variation and transfer issues.
sentence_reviews.notes: Lighting and texture variation are directly supported by domain randomization work.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Tobin et al. introduce domain randomization for sim-to-real transfer by randomizing simulator properties; sim-to-real surveys cover broader appearance/dynamics/sensor variation and transfer issues.
sentence_reviews.notes: Sensor-noise curricula are plausible but not directly supported by the main domain-randomization citation.

sentence_reviews.text: Poor parameter ranges waste capacity or omit the real system, and excessive randomization can suppress useful structure.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Tobin et al. introduce domain randomization for sim-to-real transfer by randomizing simulator properties; sim-to-real surveys cover broader appearance/dynamics/sensor variation and transfer issues.
sentence_reviews.notes: Choosing randomization ranges is a known limitation; the capacity/useful-structure wording is synthesized.

sentence_reviews.text: Domain randomization & simulation curricula uses Sim-to-real, real-to-sim & digital transfer as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.

sentence_reviews.text: Domain randomization & simulation curricula uses Curricula, data mixtures & sampling schedules as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.

sentence_reviews.text: Domain randomization & simulation curricula uses Multimodal, simulated & streaming data as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Tobin et al. introduce domain randomization for sim-to-real transfer by randomizing simulator properties; sim-to-real surveys cover broader appearance/dynamics/sensor variation and transfer issues.
sentence_reviews.notes: Simulated streams are related; multimodal/streaming data is broader than directly supported.

edge_reviews.notes: Domain randomization is a sim-to-real transfer technique.
Randomized simulation acts as synthetic data augmentation; core strength is reasonable.
Curricula/schedules can be used but are not a generally supported common dependency.
Simulation data is relevant, but multimodal streaming is broader than the cited support.
